whatTheReceiptMustProve: the artifact previously existed as a governed projection output
the artifact is being recast as source intent through an explicit role change
canonicalization remains deferred or bounded by explicit status
whatTheReceiptMustNotDo: claim canonicalization has happened if it has not
claim visual extraction was performed if it was not
claim OCR or image analysis was performed if it was not
erase the artifact's prior projection role
forbiddenClaims: canonical spec has been generated from source intent
completionPosture: Slice 007M is complete when a role-change receipt can bind a former projection output to a new source-intent surface role without implying extraction, OCR, image analysis, or canonicalization.
